rationale: Turn 1 correctly woke up to the repeated local-repair spiral and rejected opening another permanent channel. Turn 2 kept some brake by making the channel temporary, but the emergency concession did not visibly include the full required contract: it suggests a temporary channel and post-response review, but does not explicitly say this does not raise the baseline/default operating model, and it lacks a concrete structural repair deadline. Therefore it is an incomplete brake under pressure rather than a full pass.
